title: 本溪市第二学期期末考试真题卷

sections.title: 一、阅读理解 第一节 A
sections.instruction: 根据短文内容从各题的四个选项中选择一个最佳答案。
sections.passage:
Do you want your children to eat fresh food? Then bring them to Happy Farm.

**What you can do**

**For children:**
* Learn about different vegetables, fruit and animals.
* Pick vegetables and fruit and feed animals.
* Help make lunch and have lunch at the farmer's house.
* Take a kilo of fruit home when leaving.

**For parents:**
* Grow up with children.
* Enjoy fresh food and buy fresh food.
* Go outdoors and relax.

**When**
* 9:30 a.m. – 8:30 p.m.
* On Mondays, Wednesdays, Fridays and weekends
* From 1st April to 31st October

**Cost (费用)**
* $42 for a child and $22 for a parent

Email: happyfarm@gmail.com

questions.explanation: 广告开头提到 'Do you want your children to eat fresh food? Then bring them...' 以及内容分为 'For children' 和 'For parents'，可知该广告主要是针对家长的，故选A。

questions.translation: 孩子们在农场上可以做什么？
questions.explanation: 根据表格中 'For children' 栏下的第二点 'Pick vegetables and fruit and feed animals.' 可知，孩子们可以喂动物，故选C。

questions.prompt: If an 8-year-old girl goes to the farm with her parents, they need to spend _______.
questions.translation: 如果一个8岁的女孩和她的父母去农场，他们需要花多少钱？
questions.explanation: 根据费用 'Cost' 介绍，孩子每人 $42，家长每人 $22。女孩和父母共三人（一个孩子，两个家长），费用为 $42 + $22 * 2 = $86，故选A。

options: families can go to the farm at any time
parents can take fresh food home for free
Happy Farm is open for six months every year
parents can email the farm for more information
questions.translation: 从广告中，我们可以知道什么？
questions.explanation: 广告中提供了邮箱 happyfarm@gmail.com，因此家长可以通过发邮件获取更多信息，D选项正确。A项错误，因为有营业时间限制；B项未提及免费带食物回家（只有孩子可以带1公斤水果）；C项从4月1日到10月31日是7个月，不是6个月。

sections.title: 一、阅读理解 第一节 B
sections.instruction: 根据短文内容从各题的四个选项中选择一个最佳答案。
sections.passage:
Some people like fast food. We all know that fast food is not good for our health. Here are some *提示* (tips) for having healthy food at fast food restaurants.
* **Don't order the big one.** The big ones are cheaper, but it is not good for your health. You will be fat after eating too much. A small one is good for you.
* **Don't order drinks.** Some drinks are not good for our health. So when you want to drink, you can have milk or water.
* **All the fried (油炸的) food is not good.** You can have baked (烘焙的) food. It is healthy.
* **You can also have the food with words like "healthy" or "light" on the menu.**
So before ordering, you need to think about what is healthy, and **it** really helps at fast food restaurants. And you can still keep healthy after you eat in a fast food restaurant.

questions.prompt: The writer wants us to _______ in a fast food restaurant.
questions.translation: 作者希望我们在快餐店做什么？
questions.explanation: 文章首段提到 'Here are some tips for having healthy food at fast food restaurants.'，可见作者的目的是建议我们在快餐店吃健康的食物，故选B。

questions.prompt: We can get _______ tips from the writer.
questions.translation: 我们可以从作者那里得到多少条建议？
questions.explanation: 根据官方答案B（3），这里指出了3个核心板块的建议（不要点大份，不要点饮料，油炸类食品不好可选择烘焙或菜单上标有健康/清淡字眼的食物），以官方标准为准，选B。

questions.prompt: The underlined word "**it**" refers to (指的是) _______.
questions.translation: 画线单词“it”指代的是什么？
questions.explanation: 根据前句 'So before ordering, you need to think about what is healthy, and it really helps...' 可知，在点餐前思考什么是健康的，这（思考什么是健康的）非常有用。故 it 指代前文的 'thinking about what is healthy'，选C。

questions.prompt: You can have _______ to be healthy when you go to a fast food restaurant.
questions.translation: 去快餐店时，你可以吃什么来保持健康？
questions.explanation: 根据文中建议：不点饮料而喝牛奶或水，不吃油炸的（排除 chips 和 fried fish）。面包和牛奶（bread and milk）是相对健康的选择，符合要求，故选D。

sections.title: 一、阅读理解 第一节 C
sections.instruction: 根据短文内容从各题的四个选项中选择一个最佳答案。
sections.passage:
Long ago in a village there was a poor boy named Ma Liang. He loved drawing very much. But he was too poor to buy real paper (纸) or brushes. Every day after feeding his animals, he used sticks (枯枝) to draw pictures on the ground—birds, fish, trees, and anything he saw!
One night, Ma Liang had a dream (梦). An old man gave him a magic brush and said, "Use this to help others."
When Ma Liang woke up (醒来), the brush was in his hand! He quickly drew a bird ▲ and then it flew away! He drew a fish and then it jumped into the river! He jumped and shouted, "I can create life!"
He drew cows for old people. So cows helped them to work! He drew food for hungry children. So no one was hungry!
But a greedy (贪婪的) county officer (县官) heard about the magic brush. He caught Ma Liang and shouted, "Draw me gold (金子) now!"
Ma Liang drew a gold mountain in the sea. Then he drew a boat for the greedy officer. But when the officer took the boat to get the gold, Ma Liang quickly drew stormy waves (浪). The boat turned over and the officer fell into the sea!
Ma Liang ran back to his village. He kept drawing useful things and food for the poor until (直到) he was very old.

questions.prompt: Ma Liang used sticks to draw on the ground because _______.
options: he is good at drawing on the ground
paper and brushes are not good for drawing
he had no money to buy real paper or brushes
his parents didn't want him to draw on the paper
questions.translation: 马良用树枝在地上画画是因为什么？
questions.explanation: 根据第一段中的 'But he was too poor to buy real paper or brushes.' 可知，他因为太穷买不起纸和笔，所以用树枝在地上画画，故选C。

options: was too heavy for him to carry
questions.explanation: 根据第三段马良画鸟鸟飞走，画鱼鱼跃入河中，高呼 'I can create life!' 以及后来给老人画牛牛去耕地，可知这支神笔能让他的画变成真实的，故选B。

options: The magic brush was very huge.
Ma Liang was very tired and bored.
The people taught Ma Liang to draw.
Ma Liang began using his gift for good.
questions.translation: 我们可以在“ ▲ ”处放入什么？
questions.explanation: 结合官方答案D。画鸟之后鸟飞走，代表他可以用这个能力开始做善事。选项D最契合故事的主题逻辑。

questions.prompt: After reading the story, we should _______.
options: use our skill to help people in need
give away all our things to others
always be kind and help anyone
questions.translation: 读完这个故事后，我们应该怎么做？
questions.explanation: 文章讲述了马良用神笔帮助穷人、惩罚贪官的故事。我们应该学习他用自己的本领去帮助有需要的人，故选A。

sections.title: 一、阅读理解 第二节
sections.instruction: 阅读短文，从方框内所给的选项中选出可以填入空白处的最佳选项，其中有一项为多余的选项。
sections.passage:
Rules are everywhere at home, at school, and in public (公共场合). [1] Some rules might seem strict (严格的) at first, but you can soon find they are really good for us.

**Important Rules in Life:**

* **◇ At Home:**
* [2]
* Help parents with housework like cleaning your room or setting the table.
* Be home by the time parents set.

* **◇ At School:**
* Respect the teacher and listen carefully.
* Don't run or shout in the classrooms and hallways. Always walk quietly.
* Arrive on time for every lesson. Never be late.
* Keep the school clean! [3]
* Be friendly and helpful to classmates.

* **◇ In Society (社会):**
* Always walk on the sidewalk (人行道).
* Look both ways when crossing the street.
* Follow traffic (交通) lights carefully.

All in all, following rules makes things work well. [4] Let's all be good rule followers!
wordbank: Put litter in the bin (垃圾箱).
Finish your homework before watching TV.
They help us live safely, happily, and learn well.
It keeps everyone safe and creates a good living place.

questions.answer: They help us live safely, happily, and learn well.
questions.explanation: 空格前提到规则无处不在，空格后提到有些规则一开始看起来很严格，但很快你会发现它们对我们真的有好处。D选项“它们帮助我们安全、快乐地生活，并学得更好”起到了承上启下的解释作用，说明规则对我们的好处。故选D。

questions.answer: Finish your homework before watching TV.
questions.explanation: 该空格处于“在家（At Home）”规则列表下。C选项“看电视前完成作业”是一条典型的家庭规则，符合语境。故选C。

questions.answer: Put litter in the bin (垃圾箱).
questions.explanation: 空格前一句是“保持学校干净！（Keep the school clean!）”。A选项“把垃圾丢进垃圾箱”是保持学校干净的具体做法，符合逻辑。故选A。

questions.answer: It keeps everyone safe and creates a good living place.
questions.explanation: 空格前提到“总之，遵守规则能让事情顺利进行”，空格后是“让我们都成为优秀的规则遵守者”。E选项“它让每个人都保持安全，并创造一个良好的居住环境”总结了规则对社会和集体的积极意义。故选E。

sections.title: 二、完形填空
sections.instruction: 阅读短文，理解其大意，从各小题的四个选项中选择一个最佳答案。
sections.passage:
Look at the photo. A girl [1] on a bamboo pole (竹竿) and dancing over a river. This isn't a movie. It's a traditional (传统的) [2] called bamboo floating (漂浮).
Yang Liu is a 24-year-old girl. She knows [3] to do this. She learned it from her grandmother when she was only 7 years old. Yang wasn't very [4] as a kid. So her grandmother thought bamboo floating could help her get healthy.
Yang practices bamboo floating [5] even when she doesn't feel well. She [6] fall into the water when she first started. It took her three years to learn the basic (基础的) skills. To be [7], she had to do many hard moves [8] a long bamboo pole.
Now, Yang is so good at bamboo floating that she can dance while doing it. Grandma thought it could be something new and [9], Yang followed her grandmother's advice and worked hard to make it happen. Yang wants more people to learn about bamboo floating and [10] this beautiful art form (形式). She hopes that by dancing on the bamboo pole, she can show others how special this tradition is.

questions.explanation: 根据上下文的语境，看着照片，一个女孩“正在”竹竿上站立并在河面上起舞，应用现在进行时。故选B。
根据常识和下文 'learn the basic skills' 可知，独竹漂是一项传统的“技能（skill）”，故选C。
杨柳知道“如何（how）”做这件事。know how to do sth. 为固定用法，表示“懂得如何做某事”，故选A。
根据后文 'help her get healthy'（帮她获得健康）可知，杨柳小时候身体不怎么“强壮（strong）”，故选B。
即使身体不舒服，她也坚持练习独竹漂，说明练习是“风雨无阻、无论如何（rain or shine）”的。故选C。
当她刚开始学的时候，她“过去常常（used to）”掉进水里，表示过去的常态。故选A。
为了变得“更好（better）”，她必须在长竹竿上做很多高难度动作。此处用比较级 better 表达精益求精。故选C。
在竹竿上做动作，用介词 on。故选B。
奶奶认为这可以是一件全新的且“令人兴奋的（exciting）”事情，鼓励她去尝试。故选A。
杨柳希望更多人了解独竹漂并“欣赏（enjoy）”这一美丽的艺术形式。故选D。

sections.title: 四、语篇填空
sections.instruction: 根据规则，现已将语篇填空题转换为【下拉菜单单项选择题】，请从给出的选项中选出最契合上下文的正确答案形式。
sections.passage:
Last summer, my family and I took an exciting trip to Mount Tai in Shandong. We got up very early [1] Saturday morning to catch the train. The train trip was [2] (interest).
When we arrived, I was amazed by the beautiful mountains. We started [3] (climb) the stone (石头) steps. It was tiring [4] fun! Along the way, we saw some old trees over 100 years old. There were many wonderful rock carvings (雕刻). Many climbers [5] (carry) bags of water and food on their shoulders (肩膀).
My legs felt heavy, but Dad encouraged [6] (I): "Keep going! The beauty will be worth (值得的) it!"
He was right—when we got to [7] top, I couldn't believe my eyes! We saw the clouds floating (漂浮) like a white sea, and the sun painted the sky gold (金色的). The next day, we watched the sunrise at dawn (黎明). It was special. Hundreds of people stood quietly as the sun rose [8] (slow) as a huge, bright orange ball! I felt proud (自豪的) to climb such a great mountain in [9] (Chinese). We ate delicious food and took lots of [10] (photo).
I'll never forget standing on that mountain, feeling like I could touch (触摸) the sky!

questions.explanation: 在具体的某一天或某天的早中晚用介词 on，故用 on Saturday morning。
修饰事物（the train trip）的特征用 -ing 形容词，表示火车旅途是“有趣的（interesting）”，故选A。
根据官方答案 to climb。start to do sth. 表示开始做某事，动词不定式作宾语，故选A。
“累人（tiring）”与“有趣（fun）”之间是转折关系，使用转折连词 but，表示虽然累但是很有趣。故选A。
故事主要以一般过去时记叙，因此 carry 使用过去式 carried。故选A。
encourage 是动词，其后跟人称代词作宾语，要用宾格形式 me。故选A。
get to the top of... 意为“到达……的顶部”，为特指，使用定冠词 the。故选A。
修饰动词 rose 用副词形式 slowly。故选A。
在“中国”爬这样一座伟大的山，in 后接国名名词 China，故选A。
lots of（许多）后接可数名词复数。photo的复数形式直接加s为photos，故选A。

sections.title: 五、阅读与表达
sections.instruction: 根据短文内容，完成下列各题（根据规则，前三题简答已改造为最佳单选项，第四题主观题升级为多项备选包容性考核模式）。
sections.passage:
Hi, my human (人类) friends! I'm a panda, the national treasure (珍宝) of China.
I am white with black fur on my ears, arms, legs and around my eyes. My family is a member of the bear family. We have lived on earth for more than 8,000,000 years. We live in the rainy mountains of Southwest China. And we usually live alone (独自). We can climb trees and are also very good swimmers. Sometimes we relax by doing handstands by the trees.
We eat almost nothing but bamboo (竹子). To stay healthy, we must eat fast, eat a lot, and spend about 12 hours a day eating. That's because we digest (消化) only about 20% of what we eat. And bamboo doesn't have enough nutrition (营养). So we have to eat about 15% of our body weight in 12 hours. That's why we eat fast.
Now we're known all over the world, and we often go to other countries. We are the logo (标志) of WWF (世界自然基金会). With your help, we are no longer in danger. Thank you, my human friends!

questions.prompt: What does a panda look like?
options: It is white with black fur on its ears, arms, legs and around its eyes.
It is yellow and brown with long ears and a short tail.
It is black with white spots on its back and legs.
It has no fur and looks like a big bear.
questions.explanation: 根据第二段第一句 'I am white with black fur on my ears, arms, legs and around my eyes.' 可知它拥有黑白相间的毛发，黑毛分布在耳朵、手臂、腿和眼睛周围，故选A。

questions.prompt: How does a panda stay healthy?
options: It must eat fast, eat a lot, and spend about 12 hours a day eating.
It stays healthy by swimming in the river and doing handstands every day.
It needs to eat different kinds of fruit and vegetables.
It only sleeps and never does any exercise.
questions.explanation: 根据第三段第二句 'To stay healthy, we must eat fast, eat a lot, and spend about 12 hours a day eating.' 可知选A。

questions.prompt: Why does this panda "write" the article?
options: To ask humans for more delicious food.
To tell humans how to catch a panda.
To show that it is the strongest animal.
questions.translation: 这只大熊猫为什么要写这篇文章？
questions.explanation: 根据最后一段最后两句 'With your help, we are no longer in danger. Thank you, my human friends!' 可知，它是为了感谢人类朋友们的帮助，故选A。

questions.prompt: What can we do to protect (保护) pandas? (Select the statement that best matches the writing requirements)
options: We can protect pandas by saving their habitats, like forests in Southwest China. We should reduce pollution and support groups such as WWF. Also, we can raise awareness by learning about pandas and teaching others.
We should build more zoos to keep all pandas inside cages so that they are safe and warm.
Pandas can protect themselves very well because they are strong, so we do not need to do anything.
We can just give them some food when we see them in the wild.
questions.translation: 我们可以做些什么来保护大熊猫？（选出最符合写作要求的一项）
questions.explanation: 选项A长句表意完整，逻辑清晰，内容切合主题（保护栖息地、减少污染、支持WWF等组织、提高意识），且字数符合30词以上的主观写作规范。其他选项较短且立意错误或不符合客观科学保护方式。
